tables.name: dbo.AWBuildVersion
tables.comment: Current version number of the AdventureWorks 2016 sample database.

columns.name: SystemInformationID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: Database Version
columns.comment: Version number of the database in 9.yy.mm.dd.00 format.

columns.name: VersionDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: dbo.DatabaseLog
tables.comment: Audit table tracking all DDL changes made to the AdventureWorks database. Data is captured by the database trigger ddlDatabaseTriggerLog.

columns.name: DatabaseLogID
columns.comment: Primary key for DatabaseLog records.

columns.name: PostTime
columns.comment: Nonclustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: DatabaseUser
columns.comment: The user who implemented the DDL change.

columns.name: Event
columns.comment: The type of DDL statement that was executed.

columns.name: Schema
columns.comment: The schema to which the changed object belongs.

columns.name: Object
columns.comment: The object that was changed by the DDL statment.

columns.name: TSQL
columns.comment: The exact Transact-SQL statement that was executed.

columns.name: XmlEvent
columns.comment: The raw XML data generated by database trigger.

tables.name: dbo.ErrorLog
tables.comment: Audit table tracking errors in the the AdventureWorks database that are caught by the CATCH block of a TRY...CATCH construct. Data is inserted by stored procedure dbo.uspLogError when it is executed from inside the CATCH block of a TRY...CATCH construct.

columns.name: ErrorLogID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: ErrorTime
columns.comment: The date and time at which the error occurred.

columns.name: UserName
columns.comment: The user who executed the batch in which the error occurred.

columns.name: ErrorNumber
columns.comment: The error number of the error that occurred.

columns.name: ErrorSeverity
columns.comment: The severity of the error that occurred.

columns.name: ErrorState
columns.comment: The state number of the error that occurred.

columns.name: ErrorProcedure
columns.comment: The name of the stored procedure or trigger where the error occurred.

columns.name: ErrorLine
columns.comment: The line number at which the error occurred.

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.comment: The message text of the error that occurred.

tables.name: HumanResources.Department
tables.comment: Lookup table containing the departments within the Adventure Works Cycles company.

columns.name: DepartmentID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: Name
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: GroupName
columns.comment: Name of the group to which the department belongs.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: HumanResources.Employee
tables.comment: Employee information such as salary, department, and title.

columns.name: BusinessEntityID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: NationalIDNumber
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: LoginID
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: OrganizationNode
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: OrganizationLevel
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: JobTitle
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index. Used to support replication samples.

columns.name: BirthDate
columns.comment: Date of birth.

columns.name: MaritalStatus
columns.comment: M = Married, S = Single

columns.name: Gender
columns.comment: M = Male, F = Female

columns.name: HireDate
columns.comment: Employee hired on this date.

columns.name: SalariedFlag
columns.comment: Job classification. 0 = Hourly, not exempt from collective bargaining. 1 = Salaried, exempt from collective bargaining.

columns.name: VacationHours
columns.comment: Number of available vacation hours.

columns.name: SickLeaveHours
columns.comment: Number of available sick leave hours.

columns.name: CurrentFlag
columns.comment: 0 = Inactive, 1 = Active

columns.name: rowguid
columns.comment: ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: HumanResources.EmployeeDepartmentHistory
tables.comment: Employee department transfers.

columns.name: BusinessEntityID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: DepartmentID
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: ShiftID
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: StartDate
columns.comment: Date the employee started work in the department.

columns.name: EndDate
columns.comment: Date the employee left the department. NULL = Current department.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: HumanResources.EmployeePayHistory
tables.comment: Employee pay history.

columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: RateChangeDate
columns.comment: Date the change in pay is effective

columns.name: Rate
columns.comment: Salary hourly rate.

columns.name: PayFrequency
columns.comment: 1 = Salary received monthly, 2 = Salary received biweekly

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Person.Person
tables.comment: Human beings involved with AdventureWorks: employees, customer contacts, and vendor contacts.

columns.name: BusinessEntityID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: PersonType
columns.comment: Primary type of person: SC = Store Contact, IN = Individual (retail) customer, SP = Sales person, EM = Employee (non-sales), VC = Vendor contact, GC = General contact

columns.name: NameStyle
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index. Used to support replication samples.

columns.name: Title
columns.comment: A courtesy title. For example, Mr. or Ms.

columns.name: FirstName
columns.comment: First name of the person.

columns.name: MiddleName
columns.comment: Middle name or middle initial of the person.

columns.name: LastName
columns.comment: Last name of the person.

columns.name: Suffix
columns.comment: Surname suffix. For example, Sr. or Jr.

columns.name: EmailPromotion
columns.comment: 0 = Contact does not wish to receive e-mail promotions, 1 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks, 2 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks and selected partners.

columns.name: AdditionalContactInfo
columns.comment: Additional contact information about the person stored in xml format.

columns.name: Demographics
columns.comment: Personal information such as hobbies, and income collected from online shoppers. Used for sales analysis.

columns.name: rowguid
columns.comment: ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

columns.name: PhoneNumberTypeID
columns.comment: Kind of phone number. Foreign key to PhoneNumberType.PhoneNumberTypeID.

tables.name: Production.BillOfMaterials
tables.comment: Items required to make bicycles and bicycle subassemblies. It identifies the heirarchical relationship between a parent product and its components.

columns.name: BillOfMaterialsID
columns.comment: Clustered index.

columns.name: ProductAssemblyID
columns.comment: Nonclustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: ComponentID
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: StartDate
columns.comment: Date the component started being used in the assembly item.

columns.name: EndDate
columns.comment: Date the component stopped being used in the assembly item.

columns.name: UnitMeasureCode
columns.comment: Standard code identifying the unit of measure for the quantity.

columns.name: BOMLevel
columns.comment: Indicates the depth the component is from its parent (AssemblyID).

columns.name: PerAssemblyQty
columns.comment: Quantity of the component needed to create the assembly.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

columns.comment: Depth in the document hierarchy.

columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: Owner
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index. Used to support FileStream.

columns.name: FolderFlag
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: FileName
columns.comment: File name of the document

columns.name: FileExtension
columns.comment: File extension indicating the document type. For example, .doc or .txt.

columns.name: Revision
columns.comment: Revision number of the document.

columns.name: ChangeNumber
columns.comment: Engineering change approval number.

columns.name: Status
columns.comment: 1 = Pending approval, 2 = Approved, 3 = Obsolete

columns.name: DocumentSummary
columns.comment: Document abstract.

columns.name: Document
columns.comment: Complete document.

columns.name: rowguid
columns.comment: ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Required for FileStream.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Production.Product
tables.comment: Products sold or used in the manfacturing of sold products.

columns.name: ProductNumber
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: MakeFlag
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index. Used to support replication samples.

columns.name: FinishedGoodsFlag
columns.comment: 0 = Product is not a salable item. 1 = Product is salable.

columns.name: Color
columns.comment: Product color.

columns.name: SafetyStockLevel
columns.comment: Minimum inventory quantity.

columns.name: ReorderPoint
columns.comment: Inventory level that triggers a purchase order or work order.

columns.name: StandardCost
columns.comment: Standard cost of the product.

columns.name: ListPrice
columns.comment: Selling price.

columns.name: Size
columns.comment: Product size.

columns.name: SizeUnitMeasureCode
columns.comment: Unit of measure for Size column.

columns.name: WeightUnitMeasureCode
columns.comment: Unit of measure for Weight column.

columns.name: Weight
columns.comment: Product weight.

columns.name: DaysToManufacture
columns.comment: Number of days required to manufacture the product.

columns.name: ProductLine
columns.comment: R = Road, M = Mountain, T = Touring, S = Standard

columns.name: Class
columns.comment: H = High, M = Medium, L = Low

columns.name: Style
columns.comment: W = Womens, M = Mens, U = Universal

columns.name: ProductSubcategoryID
columns.comment: Product is a member of this product subcategory. Foreign key to ProductSubCategory.ProductSubCategoryID.

columns.name: ProductModelID
columns.comment: Product is a member of this product model. Foreign key to ProductModel.ProductModelID.

columns.name: SellStartDate
columns.comment: Date the product was available for sale.

columns.name: SellEndDate
columns.comment: Date the product was no longer available for sale.

columns.name: DiscontinuedDate
columns.comment: Date the product was discontinued.

columns.name: rowguid
columns.comment: ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

columns.name: ScheduledStartDate
columns.comment: Planned manufacturing start date.

columns.name: ScheduledEndDate

columns.name: ActualStartDate
columns.comment: Actual start date.

columns.name: ActualEndDate
columns.comment: Actual end date.

columns.name: ActualResourceHrs

columns.name: PlannedCost

columns.name: ActualCost

columns.name: ModifiedDate

tables.name: Purchasing.ProductVendor
tables.comment: Cross-reference table mapping vendors with the products they supply.

columns.name: ProductID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: BusinessEntityID
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: AverageLeadTime
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: StandardPrice
columns.comment: The vendor's usual selling price.

columns.name: LastReceiptCost
columns.comment: The selling price when last purchased.

columns.name: LastReceiptDate
columns.comment: Date the product was last received by the vendor.

columns.name: MinOrderQty
columns.comment: The maximum quantity that should be ordered.

columns.name: MaxOrderQty
columns.comment: The minimum quantity that should be ordered.

columns.name: OnOrderQty
columns.comment: The quantity currently on order.

columns.name: UnitMeasureCode
columns.comment: The product's unit of measure.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Purchasing.PurchaseOrderDetail
tables.comment: Individual products associated with a specific purchase order. See PurchaseOrderHeader.

columns.name: PurchaseOrderID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: PurchaseOrderDetailID
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: DueDate
columns.comment: Date the product is expected to be received.

columns.name: OrderQty
columns.comment: Quantity ordered.

columns.name: ProductID
columns.comment: Product identification number. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.name: UnitPrice
columns.comment: Vendor's selling price of a single product.

columns.name: LineTotal
columns.comment: Per product subtotal. Computed as OrderQty * UnitPrice.

columns.name: ReceivedQty
columns.comment: Quantity actually received from the vendor.

columns.name: RejectedQty
columns.comment: Quantity rejected during inspection.

columns.name: StockedQty
columns.comment: Quantity accepted into inventory. Computed as ReceivedQty - RejectedQty.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Purchasing.PurchaseOrderHeader
tables.comment: General purchase order information. See PurchaseOrderDetail.

columns.name: PurchaseOrderID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: RevisionNumber
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: Status
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: EmployeeID
columns.comment: Employee who created the purchase order. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: VendorID
columns.comment: Vendor with whom the purchase order is placed. Foreign key to Vendor.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: ShipMethodID
columns.comment: Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.

columns.name: OrderDate
columns.comment: Purchase order creation date.

columns.name: ShipDate
columns.comment: Estimated shipment date from the vendor.

columns.name: SubTotal
columns.comment: Purchase order subtotal. Computed as SUM(PurchaseOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate PurchaseOrderID.

columns.name: TaxAmt
columns.comment: Tax amount.

columns.name: Freight
columns.comment: Shipping cost.

columns.name: TotalDue
columns.comment: Total due to vendor. Computed as Subtotal + TaxAmt + Freight.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Purchasing.Vendor
tables.comment: Companies from whom Adventure Works Cycles purchases parts or other goods.

columns.name: BusinessEntityID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: AccountNumber
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: Name
columns.comment: Company name.

columns.name: CreditRating
columns.comment: 1 = Superior, 2 = Excellent, 3 = Above average, 4 = Average, 5 = Below average

columns.name: PreferredVendorStatus
columns.comment: 0 = Do not use if another vendor is available. 1 = Preferred over other vendors supplying the same product.

columns.name: ActiveFlag
columns.comment: 0 = Vendor no longer used. 1 = Vendor is actively used.

columns.name: PurchasingWebServiceURL
columns.comment: Vendor URL.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Sales.SalesOrderDetail
tables.comment: Individual products associated with a specific sales order. See SalesOrderHeader.

columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: SalesOrderDetailID
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index. Used to support replication samples.

columns.name: CarrierTrackingNumber
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: OrderQty
columns.comment: Quantity ordered per product.

columns.name: ProductID
columns.comment: Product sold to customer. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.comment: Promotional code. Foreign key to SpecialOffer.SpecialOfferID.

columns.name: UnitPrice
columns.comment: Selling price of a single product.

columns.name: UnitPriceDiscount
columns.comment: Discount amount.

columns.comment: Per product subtotal. Computed as UnitPrice * (1 - UnitPriceDiscount) * OrderQty.

columns.comment: ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.

columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Sales.SalesOrderHeader
tables.comment: General sales order information.

columns.name: SalesOrderID
columns.comment: Clustered index created by a primary key constraint.

columns.name: RevisionNumber
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index. Used to support replication samples.

columns.name: OrderDate
columns.comment: Unique nonclustered index.

columns.name: DueDate
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: ShipDate
columns.comment: Nonclustered index.

columns.name: Status
columns.comment: Order current status. 1 = In process; 2 = Approved; 3 = Backordered; 4 = Rejected; 5 = Shipped; 6 = Cancelled

columns.name: OnlineOrderFlag
columns.comment: 0 = Order placed by sales person. 1 = Order placed online by customer.

columns.name: SalesOrderNumber
columns.comment: Unique sales order identification number.

columns.name: PurchaseOrderNumber
columns.comment: Customer purchase order number reference.

columns.name: AccountNumber
columns.comment: Financial accounting number reference.

columns.name: CustomerID
columns.comment: Customer identification number. Foreign key to Customer.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: SalesPersonID
columns.comment: Sales person who created the sales order. Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: TerritoryID
columns.comment: Territory in which the sale was made. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

columns.name: BillToAddressID
columns.comment: Customer billing address. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

columns.name: ShipToAddressID
columns.comment: Customer shipping address. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

columns.name: ShipMethodID
columns.comment: Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.

columns.name: CreditCardID
columns.comment: Credit card identification number. Foreign key to CreditCard.CreditCardID.

columns.name: CreditCardApprovalCode
columns.comment: Approval code provided by the credit card company.

columns.name: CurrencyRateID
columns.comment: Currency exchange rate used. Foreign key to CurrencyRate.CurrencyRateID.

columns.name: SubTotal
columns.comment: Sales subtotal. Computed as SUM(SalesOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate SalesOrderID.

columns.name: TaxAmt
columns.comment: Tax amount.

columns.name: Freight
columns.comment: Shipping cost.

columns.name: TotalDue
columns.comment: Total due from customer. Computed as Subtotal + TaxAmt + Freight.

columns.name: Comment
columns.comment: Sales representative comments.

columns.name: rowguid
columns.comment: ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.

columns.name: ModifiedDate
columns.comment: Date and time the record was last updated.
